pageProps.content:
["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","p",null,{"children":"从 Mageia 6 开始，Mageia 的软件仓库同时兼容 urpmi 和 dnf，两个包管理器默认情况下均被预装。由于在可预见的未来里，urpmi 仍是默认包管理器且 Mageia 控制中心也只调用 urpmi，所以 urpmi 是必须要配置好的，而 dnf 可以按你的实际需要选择是否进行配置。"}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"urpmi-配置方法","children":"urpmi 配置方法"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"移除所有已添加的软件仓库（sudo 似乎是没有被预装的，可以在稍后再安装使用）："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"添加软件源"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[{"title":"版本","items":[["7",{"version":"7"}],["8",{"version":"8"}],["9",{"version":"9"}],["7.1",{"version":"7.1"}]]},{"title":"架构","items":[["x86_64",{"arch":"x86_64"}],["aarch64",{"arch":"aarch64"}],["armv7hl",{"arch":"armv7hl"}]]}],"templateId":"template-1","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"刷新缓存："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-2","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"dnf-配置方法","children":"dnf 配置方法"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"dnf 在默认情况下已经被预装，如果你发现并没有，可以使用 urpmi 安装："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-3","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["接下来编辑 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/yum.repos.d/"}]," 中的文件："]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"将所有文件中的："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-4"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"替换为："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-5"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"注：为了让 dnf 能在镜像站软件源出现问题时，自动切换至其它后备软件源，我们不建议你注释掉 mirrorlist 行。"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"为了避免 dnf 和 urpmi 启用的软件仓库不一致，在保存之前，还需要额外进行检查，查看 urpmi 已启用仓库的方法如下："}],"
",["$r","ul",null,{"children":["
",["$r","li",null,{"children":"打开 Mageia 控制中心。"}],"
",["$r","li",null,{"children":"选择配置安装和更新所用的介质源。"}],"
"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["默认情况下，一个使用 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"x86_64"}]," 架构的 Mageia 在 urpmi 下默认启用的仓库有："]}],"
",["$r","ul",null,{"children":["
",["$r","li",null,{"children":"Core Release"}],"
",["$r","li",null,{"children":"Core Updates"}],"
",["$r","li",null,{"children":"Nonfree Release"}],"
",["$r","li",null,{"children":"Nonfree Updates"}],"
",["$r","li",null,{"children":"Core 32bit Release"}],"
",["$r","li",null,{"children":"Core 32bit Updates"}],"
",["$r","li",null,{"children":"Nonfree 32bit Release"}],"
",["$r","li",null,{"children":"Nonfree 32bit Updates"}],"
"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["接下来，逐个检查文件，确认 urpmi 已仓库在 dnf 也被已启用，依然是编辑 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/yum.repos.d/"}]," 中的文件："]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["以 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/yum.repos.d/mageia-x86_64.repo"}]," 为例，你需要确认所有需要开启的软件仓库，如 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"[mageia-x86_64]"}]," 和 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"[updates-x86_64]"}]," （即 Core Release 和 Core Updates）部分末端 enabled 值为 1，其它所有不启用的仓库 enabled 值为 0。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"保存所有的文件，退出。"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"刷新缓存："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-6","codeLanguage":"bash"}]]}]

compiledTemplates.template-0: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("su");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("urpmi.removemedia -a");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-1: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("su");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("urpmi.addmedia --distrib ");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/distrib/");t.b(t.v(t.f("version",c,p,0)));t.b("/");t.b(t.v(t.f("arch",c,p,0)));return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-2: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("su");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("urpmi.update -a");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-3: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("su");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("urpmi mageia-repos dnf");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-6: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("su");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("dnf makecache");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
